title: Signature capture capability on Mobile app
excerpt: I really would like to be able to capture a signature from the mobile app.  I have field techs and we use Monday.com for work order ticketing, and I need a way for the tech to be able to capture a signature from his phon…

posts.author: treyflake (Trey Flake)
posts.cookedHtml: I really would like to be able to capture a signature from the mobile app. I have field techs and we use Monday.com for work order ticketing, and I need a way for the tech to be able to capture a signature from his phone.

posts.author: Rgraff13 (Rachel Graff)
posts.cookedHtml: Hi! We’re you ever able to figure out a solution for this? We too could really use this signature feature!

posts.author: Gabo (Gabriel Braun)
posts.cookedHtml: I will also could use this feature
